Live demos

📅Calidar

A headless, framework-agnostic calendar engine with Google / Outlook-style UX.

One engine — @calidar/core, zero dependencies — rendered by four thin adapters. The demos below are the same calendar, framework by framework.

React

@calidar/react

Open demo →

Svelte

@calidar/svelte

Open demo →

Vue

@calidar/vue

Open demo →

Solid

@calidar/solid

Open demo →
